category_sources: Official GitHub README describes tproxy as a tool for monitoring gRPC, MySQL, and any TCP connections.
source_facts.description says it proxies and analyzes TCP connections.
display_name_sources: Official GitHub repository and README heading use tproxy.
docs_sources: Official GitHub README provides installation, usage flags, and examples.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is already populated; repo intentionally not re-determined.
tags_sources: Official GitHub README examples cover gRPC and MySQL connection monitoring and TCP reliability statistics.
